DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT LUIS ADAME'S MOTION FOR ORDER REQUIRING PLAINTIFF TO COMPLY WITH DEFENDANT'S CCP 724.050 DEMAND, AND FOR PAYMENT OF SANCTIONS. ARGUED AND THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF'S ORAL REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE IS DENIED. DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER REQUIRING PLAINTIFF TO COMPLY WITH DEFENDANT'S CCP 724.050 DEMAND IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF MUST CASH THE $798.00 CHECK AND FILE A SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT. FURTHER, PLAINTIFF MUST PAY DEFENDANT A $100 MANDATORY FEE FOR FAILURE TO RESPOND TO THE 724.050 DEMAND. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS IS DENIED. DEFENDANT TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. (THIS MATTER WAS HEARD ON THE COURT'S LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR). (302/LMG) JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI, REPORTER: KARLA ELLIS-DAVIS, CSR #12998

MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF VICTORIA PETERSON'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER CORRECTING ARBITRATION AWARD [OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE VACATING THE ARBITRATION AWARD] CCP 1285.
Appearances: Victoria Lynn Peterson (730.6475) plaintiff and moving party appearing in propria persona; no other appearances.
Ms. Peterson presented proof of service of her motion, and indicated that she received a copy of the opposition from defendant. The court continued the matter to September 15, 2011. Clerk to call defendant's counsel re: status of the opposition and to advise of the continued hearing date. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
---

Spoke with Mia at defense counsel's office. Opposition was mailed to the court for filing on August 12, 2011. She will mail a courtesy copy directly to department 302 for the hearing on September 15, 2011.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Requiring Plaintiff To Comply With Defendant'S Ccp 724.050 Demand, And For Payment Of Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-09-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT LUIS ADAME'S MOTION FOR ORDER REQUIRING PLAINTIFF TO COMPLY WITH DEFENDANT'S CCP 724.050 DEMAND, AND FOR PAYMENT OF SANCTIONS.
Appearances: Victoria Lynn Peterson (730.6475) plaintiff and responding party appearing in propria persona; no other appearances.
Argued and the court ruled as follows: Plaintiff's oral request for a continuance is denied. Defendant's motion for an order requiring plaintiff to comply with defendant's CCP 724.050 demand is granted. Plaintiff must cash the $798.00 check and file a satisfaction of judgment. Further, plaintiff must pay defendant a $100 mandatory fee for failure to respond to the 724.050 demand. Defendant's request for attorney fees and costs is denied. Defendant to submit a proposed form of order. (This matter was heard on the court's Law and Motion Calendar). (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-18-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT LUIS ADAME MOTION TO STRIKE THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION AND EXEMPLARY DAMAGES ATTACHMENT FROM COMPLAINT. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion to strike second cause of action and punitive damages claim granted with 10 days leave to amend. The allegations do not support an intentional tort. Insufficient facts alleged to demonstrate oppression, fraud, or malice required to support punitive damages claim. (Moving party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
